nl_question: What was the total Full Commission revenue for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)?
uc_sql:
SELECT SUM(d.Amount) AS value
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.Metric IN ('FullCommission')
  AND d.IncludedInTotalRevenue = 1
notes: FullCommission = Commission + TicketFee + TicketFeeByPercent (computed in Synapse SP).

nl_question: What was the total deposit amount (USD) to the Trading Platform for valid customers yesterday (2026-06-08)? Include both internal and external deposits.
uc_sql:
SELECT SUM(d.AmountUSD) AS value
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.MIMOAction = 'Deposit' AND d.MIMOPlatform = 'TP' AND d.IsRedeem = 0
notes: Tile shows 'Deposits to TP ($ Amount)' = InternalDepositsTPAmount + ExternalDepositsTPAmount in the wide TVF row. UC equivalent: SUM(AmountUSD) on the long-form MIMO fact filtered to MIMOAction='Deposit' AND MIMOPlatform='TP' AND IsRedeem=0 (excludes crypto-redeem-as-deposit reclass).

nl_question: How many valid customers had a successful global cashout (any platform) yesterday (2026-06-08)?
uc_sql:
SELECT SUM(d.GlobalCashedOut) AS value
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_daily_status d
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
  AND d.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
notes: GlobalCashedOut is a 0/1 flag per (DateID, RealCID) on the daily-status table; SUM yields a count. Distinct from MIMO event-grain — this is per-customer attribution from customer_daily_status.

nl_question: What was the total realized + unrealized daily PnL across all valid customers' positions on 2026-06-08?
uc_sql:
SELECT SUM(d.NetProfit + UnrealizedPnLChange) AS value
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_pnl d
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = d.RealCID
   AND snap.IsCreditReportValidCB = 1
   AND d.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE d.DateID = 20260608
notes: Synapse TVF surfaces DailyPnLStocks/Crypto/Copy/Manual as separate columns; DailyTotalPnL on the canvas is their sum. UC fact_pnl stores NetProfit (realized) + UnrealizedPnLChange (mark-to-market delta) per (RealCID, InstrumentTypeID, IsSettled, IsCopy).
